title: SaaS Analytics Dashboard
description: Responsive dashboard for tracking growth metrics, revenue, and customer activity.
longDescription: A polished SaaS dashboard concept with responsive cards, data sections, accessible interactions, and a layout optimized for repeated daily use.

title: Focus Task App
description: Productivity app interface with task grouping, priority states, and clean mobile UX.
longDescription: A lightweight task app prototype designed for focus sessions, including priority labels, compact navigation, and mobile-first task management flows.

title: Creative Brand System
description: Landing page and design system exploration for a modern creative studio.
longDescription: A brand-focused design exploration covering typography, reusable sections, color tokens, and a clean landing page experience for a creative studio.

title: Portfolio Builder
description: Personal website template with JSON content, dark mode, and project filtering.
longDescription: A data-driven personal portfolio template that separates content from presentation, supports theme switching, and keeps the UI fast with vanilla JavaScript.

title: Mobile Wallet UI
description: App UI concept for wallet overview, transaction history, and transfer flows.
longDescription: A compact mobile wallet interface designed around clarity, trust, and fast scanning for balances, transactions, and common payment actions.

title: Agency Website
description: Marketing website for a digital agency with strong hierarchy and fast loading pages.
longDescription: A modern agency website concept using semantic HTML, responsive layout systems, strong content hierarchy, and optimized visual assets.
